§ 002 — 04  /  Identity

Personal
ID.

Visual Identity System

_Delfina Perez Conti

Year2025
TypeIdentity
CategoryCollege
Scroll

Brief

Your mark.
Your voice.

As an emerging designer, develop a logo or mark and apply it consistently across a variety of collateral. The work should show rigorous creative exploration, strong technical execution, and clear explanation of your design choices — built entirely in Adobe Illustrator.

Process

Buenos
Aires.

A visual identity that translates my personal universe into a dynamic and expressive graphic system. Through display typography, an aesthetic rooted in Buenos Aires, organic forms, and a vibrant palette — the project develops a logotype and editorial applications that show coherence, versatility, and a strong authorial voice.
